Help Madeline climb Celeste Mountain and reach the summit while overcoming challenging platforming obstacles. Jump across gaps, dash through the air, and climb walls to navigate hand-crafted levels. Avoid deadly spikes and falling into pits. Each screen presents new challenges that test your precision and timing. Collect strawberries for bonus points as you ascend the mountain! Arrow Keys: Move left/right, climb up/down on walls Space: Jump (press again in air for double jump) Z: Air dash in the direction you're moving (limited uses, recharges on landing) Enter: Start game ESC: Pause/Unpause R: Restart to main menu Tests basic movement, jumping, and navigation through the first level. Validates that the player can move, jump, and reach the goal platform to complete a level. Move right using arrow keys, jump over gaps and obstacles, and reach the goal flag at the end of the level. Use simple platforming skills without advanced mechanics. Successfully navigate to the goal flag, trigger level completion, and advance to the next screen. Test passes when player reaches at least level 3 without dying. Tests optimal strategy to complete all levels and win the game. Uses advanced mechanics including wall climbing, dashing, and double jumping to navigate challenging sections efficiently. Utilize all movement abilities strategically - wall climb to reach higher platforms, dash through gaps, double jump for extra height. Avoid all hazards while collecting strawberries when safe. Navigate through all screens to reach the summit. Complete all levels, reach the mountain summit, trigger GAME_OVER_WIN state. Test succeeds when the win condition is achieved within a reasonable time frame. Tests hazard interaction and death mechanics. Validates that touching spikes or falling into pits properly triggers respawn at the current level's starting position. Intentionally move into spikes and fall into pits to test death and respawn mechanics. Verify that lives decrease and player respawns correctly. Player dies upon contact with hazards, respawns at level start with one less life. When lives reach zero, GAME_OVER_LOSE is triggered. Test validates proper game over handling. Tests dash mechanic recharge system and wall climbing physics. Validates that dashes recharge on landing and wall sliding works properly. Repeatedly dash in the air and verify it depletes. Land on platforms to recharge dash. Climb walls by holding against them and pressing up/down. Dash depletes when used in air and recharges upon landing. Wall climbing allows vertical movement. Test succeeds when mechanics work consistently across multiple uses. Tests strawberry collection system. Validates that collecting strawberries increases score and they disappear from the level. Navigate levels specifically targeting strawberry positions. Collect multiple strawberries across different levels and verify score increases. Score increases by correct amount for each strawberry collected. Strawberries are removed from the level after collection. CELESTE MOUNTAIN

Help Madeline climb Celeste Mountain and reach the summit while overcoming challenging platforming obstacles. Jump across gaps, dash through the air, and climb walls to navigate hand-crafted levels. Avoid deadly spikes and falling into pits. Each screen presents new challenges that test your precision and timing. Collect strawberries for bonus points as you ascend the mountain!

Arrow Keys: Move left/right, climb up/down on walls | Space: Jump (press again in air for double jump) | Z: Air dash in the direction you're moving (limited uses, recharges on landing) | Enter: Start game | ESC: Pause/Unpause | R: Restart to main menu

TEST_2.expected_outcome: Complete all levels, reach the mountain summit, trigger GAME_OVER_WIN state. Test succeeds when the win condition is achieved within a reasonable time frame.

TEST_3.test_description: Tests hazard interaction and death mechanics. Validates that touching spikes or falling into pits properly triggers respawn at the current level's starting position.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Intentionally move into spikes and fall into pits to test death and respawn mechanics. Verify that lives decrease and player respawns correctly.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Player dies upon contact with hazards, respawns at level start with one less life. When lives reach zero, GAME_OVER_LOSE is triggered. Test validates proper game over handling.

TEST_4.test_description: Tests dash mechanic recharge system and wall climbing physics. Validates that dashes recharge on landing and wall sliding works properly.
TEST_4.strategy_description: Repeatedly dash in the air and verify it depletes. Land on platforms to recharge dash. Climb walls by holding against them and pressing up/down.
TEST_4.expected_outcome: Dash depletes when used in air and recharges upon landing. Wall climbing allows vertical movement. Test succeeds when mechanics work consistently across multiple uses.

TEST_5.test_description: Tests strawberry collection system. Validates that collecting strawberries increases score and they disappear from the level.
TEST_5.strategy_description: Navigate levels specifically targeting strawberry positions. Collect multiple strawberries across different levels and verify score increases.
TEST_5.expected_outcome: Score increases by correct amount for each strawberry collected. Strawberries are removed from the level after collection. Test validates collectible system integrity.
